data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for recipient classification.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the recipient classification, which is a critical component of the disclosure event ledger. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or logs that document the classifications of recipients, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior step evidence does not address the specific requirement of confirming recipient classifications as outlined in the linked use case.
gaps: No evidence of recipient classification (provider, payer, BA, legal authority, etc.)

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify recipient classification.
